THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARRERO, MIGUEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 863 HAIGHT STREET #4, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, STAYED UNTIL FEB-11-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, DEFT TO VACATE BY 5PM ON 2-11-97. IF VACATES, PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT & DMGS. IF PREM. NOT VACATED TIMELY, PLTF MAY HAVE AMENDED JUDGMNT FOR $611.25 BACK RENT, DMGS OF $20.37 PER DAY FROM 1-11-97 THRU 2-11-97 & POSSESSION. SECURITY DEPOSIT RETAINED BY PLTF. SEE JUDGMENT FOR ADDITIONAL TERMS.
